title: Welcome to Your Journey
content: Dear Traveler, welcome to Cozy Minds! We're delighted to have you join our community of writers and dreamers. May your journey be filled with inspiration and discovery.

title: New Features Available
content: Greetings Traveler! We've added new journal templates and mood tracking features to enhance your writing experience. Explore them in your next entry!

title: Spring Festival Reward
content: For your participation in the Spring Festival, please accept these rewards as a token of our appreciation.

title: Daily Writing Challenge
content: Write for at least 15 minutes today to maintain your streak and earn special rewards!

title: Mood Explorer
content: Use 5 different mood types in your journal entries this week.

title: Welcome Gift
content: Thank you for joining Cozy Minds! Please accept this welcome gift.
